parameters.subject: =Automation A&M - AuMedOrder - {{ $('Start').item.json.name }}
parameters.bodyContent:
=Hi Team,

Please see attached files to order for the clinic {{ $('Start').item.json.name }} for date {{ $('Start').item.json.TodaysDate }}. Any issues please contact {{ $('Get row(s)').item.json.email }}.

Regards,
Automation

parameters.body: =Clinic: {{ $('Start').first().json.name_firstItem }} Date: {{ $('Start').item.json.TodaysDate }} Status: Email sent to PharmacySentAt: {{ $now.toISO() }} Orders: {{ $('Prepare Email Attachments').first().json.totalOrders }} Subject: {{ $('Prepare Email Attachments').first().json.emailSubject }}
